links.source_location: psipb = m.psipb; thtpb = m.thtpb; sigdpy = m.sigdpy; sigdpz = m.sigdpz
psipb, thtpb, sigdpy, sigdpz, dvbtc = self._sensor_kin(SBTL, dbtk)
psipb, thtpb, sigdpy, sigdpz — seeker outputs written by sensor, consumed by guidance._pronav_term_comp
FSPB = m.FSPB; SBEL = m.SBEL; VBEL = m.VBEL — truth channels written by newton, read by ins
WBEB = m.WBEB — truth body rates written by euler, read by ins
SBELC, VBELC, TBLC — INS estimates consumed by guidance
WBECB, FSPCB, dvbec, alphaxc, betaxc — INS estimates consumed by control
mach, pdynmc — written by environment, read by aerodynamics
alphax, betax, alppx, dvbe — incidence angles written by kinematics, read by aerodynamics
WBECB = m.WBECB — angular velocity written by euler, read by kinematics
FMB = m.FMB — total moments written by forces, read by euler
press — atmospheric pressure from environment, used for thrust correction
FAPB = m.FAPB — written by forces, read by newton
log, result, cpa = run(scenario, cfg=cfg_full, verbose=False)
from tests import TESTS; spec = TESTS[test_name]; compare(scenario, spec['title'], spec['variants'])
dna, dma, dmq, dmd, dyb, dlnb, dlnr, dlnd, wnq, wnr — dimensional derivatives computed by aerodynamics_der, consumed by control_accel
Both implement three-loop NDI (force→α/β, kinematic→rate, moment inversion); NDI-CoP adds CoP reformulation to cancel NMP zero
NDI and INDI share the same outer/middle loops; INDI replaces the full-model inner loop with an incremental form
Both implement proportional navigation; mid uses datalink geometry while terminal uses seeker LOS rates

hyperedges.label: Multi-Mode Autopilot Pattern (Accel / NDI / INDI / NDI-CoP)
